events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and record producer Lionel Richie was born on this day in 1949.

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the legend that is Lionel Richie! What's your favourite track from the Commodores frontman turned solo superstar?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper was born on this day in 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: She's so unusual! Wishing a very happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper. Which of her hits gets you dancing?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and record producer George Michael was born on this day in 1963.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move us.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's death
events.blurb: On this day in 2009, the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, passed away.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Michael Jackson, who left us on this day in 2009. His music and artistry continue to define generations. What's your ultimate MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, songwriter, and actor Ringo Starr was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th birthday to The Beatles' legendary drummer, Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! His iconic riffs have shaped rock history. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and film producer Sir Mick Jagger was born on this day in 1943.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger is 83 today! The Rolling Stones frontman is still going strong. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: Anniversary of MTV's launch
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star.'

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when music television changed everything? Today marks the anniversary of MTV's launch, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis' iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was originally released in 1994.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: 2026-08-05. It's the anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' – the album that launched a thousand singalongs. What's your favourite track from the Britpop classic?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Rewind to 1969! Today marks the anniversary of the iconic Woodstock Festival. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, passed away.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His legacy truly lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' release
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road,' was originally released on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Crossing The Road
angles.copy: A masterpiece was born! Today marks the anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' album. Which track from this legendary record is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer, songwriter, and musician Chrissie Hynde was born on this day in 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders' frontwoman, still rocking after all these years. What's your go-to Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher was born on this day in 1972.

angles.name: Mad Fer It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation, still making headlines. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' album release
events.blurb: John Lennon's seminal album 'Imagine' was originally released in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: Imagine no possessions... Today marks the anniversary of John Lennon's timeless 'Imagine' album. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod release
events.blurb: Apple released the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before streaming? Today marks the anniversary of the original iPod's release, putting a thousand songs in your pocket. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the anniversary of the premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No,' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating the iconic spy who's been thrilling us for decades. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best Bond theme song?
